SANTÉ QUÉBEC OUEST-DE-L’ÎLE-DE-MONTRÉAL – UNIVERSITAIRE
EMPLOYER
PROFILE
JOB
POSTINGS
JOB
ALERTS

Santé Québec Ouest-de-l’Île-de-Montréal – Universitaire is the cornerstone of health and social services on the West Island. Our mission is to care for the health and well-being of our communities by providing quality services that are accessible and integrated.

The largest healthcare organization on the Island of Montreal!

Our network covers over 38% of the island, and includes:

4 hospital centres, including one psychiatric hospital centre;
4 CLSCs and 9 long-term care centres (CHSLD);
1 readaptation centre for intellectual disabilities and 1 youth protection center;
Over 75 service points across 8 cities and 7 boroughs in the metropolitan area. 

We’re Waiting for You!

When you join our team, you join a dynamic network that is always focused on improving the health of the community!

Do you want to work with an organization that is committed to providing quality care, integrated services, and accessibility for all? Our organization is the perfect place for your commitment to the healthcare sector!

Explore our job opportunities today, and together, let’s shape a future where every talent, including yours, truly matters.

Research, Teaching, and Innovation: Our Academic Mission!
